title: Grammitis hornei
taxonomy: Grammitis hornei is classified within the family Polypodiaceae. This family belongs to the order Polypodiales, which is a group of ferns. Grammitis hornei is further classified as a species within the genus Grammitis. The genus Grammitis is part of the subfamily Grammitidoideae. The species Grammitis hornei is a type of epiphytic fern, commonly found in tropical regions.

intro: Grammitis hornei, also known as Maidenhair spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Australia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Grammitis hornei include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
